bead.title: prompt-ingress: hard-fail oversize on agent-side file readers (Stage D1)
bead.description:
Stage D1 of FEAT-022. Route agent-side --prompt file readers through
evidence.ReadFileClamped. Hard-fail on oversize with an actionable
error naming source, observed size, and configured cap.

Implements FEAT-022 requirements §8 and §9 for the agent-side sites
(CLI and server-dispatch file readers). Satisfies US-223 for the CLI
path.

Depends on Stage A1 (ddx-64299657) only.

In-scope files (5 sites, all in cli/internal/agent/):
- runner.go (resolvePrompt at :340)
- compare_adapter.go (defaultResolvePromptForCompare at :181)
- compare_adapter.go (benchmark suite reader at :614)
- service_run.go (PromptFile reader at :83) — confirmed path
- execute_bead.go (promptOverride raw read at :1291)

Each site replaces the raw os.ReadFile with
evidence.ReadFileClamped(path, evidence.MaxPromptBytes). On oversize:
return a non-nil error whose message contains the file path, observed
size in bytes, configured cap in bytes, and a hint pointing at
.ddx/config.yaml:evidence_caps.max_prompt_bytes.

Out-of-scope:
- Server-side inline prompt ingress (req.Prompt, DDX_AGENT_PROMPT env,
  docgraph prompt metadata) — separate bead Stage D2.
- Server text egress — Stage E.
- Any new evidence primitives — if one is needed, add to Stage A1 via
  a blocked-on dependency; do NOT inline a one-off here.

Rollback: revert the ReadFileClamped calls to os.ReadFile at each
site.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestPromptIngressOversize ./internal/agent/... passes with one subtest per in-scope site: each subtest writes a fixture file = 2× MaxPromptBytes to a temp dir, invokes the site under test, asserts the call returns a non-nil error whose message contains (a) the fixture path, (b) the observed size, (c) the cap in bytes, (d) the string 'evidence_caps.max_prompt_bytes'. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes. Integration smoke: run 'ddx agent run --prompt /tmp/huge-prompt.bin' where the file is 2× MaxPromptBytes; assert exit code != 0 and stderr contains the expected error-message substrings. AST assertion (via TestEvidencePrimitiveUsage in cli/internal/agent/): every os.ReadFile / ioutil.ReadFile call inside runner.go, compare_adapter.go, service_run.go, execute_bead.go whose argument is an opts.PromptFile-style symbol carries an //evidence:allow-unbounded annotation OR has been replaced with evidence.ReadFileClamped.

governing.title: Feature: Prompt Evidence Assembly and Size Invariants
